24AW.description: Seasonal-focused streetwear brand dropping curated pieces for each collection cycle. Clean design language with intentional color blocking and silhouette experimentation. Each season feels like a complete thought.
24AW.targetCustomer: Collectors aged 20-35 who appreciate seasonal design progression and curated drops
24AW.notes: Strong seasonal identity with thoughtful color palettes and modern silhouettes. Worth following for each new drop.

Armour Design.description: Protective aesthetic streetwear with tactical elements and functional design. Heavy armor-inspired graphics, structured silhouettes, and edgy attitude. Built for people who want to look ready for anything.
Armour Design.targetCustomer: Streetwear enthusiasts aged 18-35 interested in militaristic and tactical aesthetics
Armour Design.notes: Armor-inspired designs with serious construction. Strong visual identity around protective gear and tactical fashion.

AVAVAVA.description: Repetitive pattern-heavy brand playing with geometric and abstract designs. Maximalist approach to graphic placement—bold, unapologetic, built for visual impact. No minimalism here.
AVAVAVA.targetCustomer: Bold fashion lovers aged 18-35 seeking statement-making pieces
AVAVAVA.notes: Specializes in detailed geometric patterns and abstract graphics. Strong commitment to visual maximalism.

Avinmade.description: Contemporary pieces with careful attention to fit and proportion. Quality-focused approach to modern streetwear without unnecessary details. Clean execution on timeless silhouettes.
Avinmade.targetCustomer: Minimalist fashion enthusiasts aged 20-35 valuing quality construction
Avinmade.notes: Emphasizes fit and quality materials. Modern approach to essential pieces.

Blacklists.description: Dark aesthetic streetwear with edgy graphics and moody color schemes. List-inspired aesthetics, sometimes cryptic messaging. For people who appreciate darker fashion narratives.
Blacklists.targetCustomer: Alternative fashion enthusiasts aged 18-35 with darker aesthetic preferences
Blacklists.notes: Known for dark color palettes and conceptual graphics. Strong alternative aesthetic.

BMOB.description: Bold streetwear with confident graphic execution. Modern silhouettes paired with statement-making prints. Designed for people who want their clothes to speak.
BMOB.notes: Strong graphic design paired with modern fits. Confident brand identity.

CENS.description: Minimalist contemporary brand focusing on essential pieces. Clean lines, neutral palettes, architectural silhouettes. Built for people who value wardrobe fundamentals.
CENS.targetCustomer: Minimalist fashion enthusiasts aged 20-40 seeking wardrobe basics
CENS.notes: Emphasizes clean design and functional simplicity. Quality fundamentals.

DannyAndZee.description: Collaborative brand blending two creative perspectives into unified pieces. Balanced approach between bold and subtle—thoughtful design from dual creative vision.
DannyAndZee.targetCustomer: Design-conscious consumers aged 20-35 appreciating collaborative perspectives
DannyAndZee.notes: Unique collaborative approach brings fresh perspective to contemporary streetwear.

Dreamband.description: Surreal and dreamlike aesthetic in streetwear form. Soft color palettes, ethereal graphics, pieces that feel like wearable art. For contemplative fashion lovers.
Dreamband.targetCustomer: Artistic fashion lovers aged 18-35 seeking dreamlike aesthetics
Dreamband.notes: Emphasizes surrealism and dream-inspired visuals. Soft, ethereal approach to streetwear.

Exoskeleton.description: Techwear meets streetwear with structural, armor-like silhouettes. Futuristic design language with technical details. Built for people interested in fashion that feels ahead of its time.
Exoskeleton.targetCustomer: Tech-fashion enthusiasts aged 18-35 interested in futuristic aesthetics
Exoskeleton.notes: Strong techwear influence with technical design details. Futuristic silhouettes.

FIVEKOH.description: Asian streetwear brand with modern design sensibility. Contemporary pieces with cultural sensitivity and clean execution. Quality-focused approach to modern fashion.
FIVEKOH.targetCustomer: Young fashion enthusiasts aged 18-30 interested in contemporary Asian streetwear
FIVEKOH.notes: Modern Asian streetwear with strong design perspective. Growing presence in contemporary fashion.

Ghost Hand.description: Spectral and ethereal aesthetic with ghostly graphics and haunting color schemes. Almost supernatural approach to fashion design. For people who appreciate the mysterious.
Ghost Hand.targetCustomer: Alternative fashion lovers aged 18-35 with appreciation for mysterious aesthetics
Ghost Hand.notes: Unique ghostly aesthetic with carefully designed graphics. Ethereal and eerie design language.

Guiba.description: Playful contemporary streetwear with character and personality. Fun approach to design without sacrificing quality. Pieces that make you smile when you wear them.
Guiba.targetCustomer: Young adults aged 18-30 seeking personality-driven fashion
Guiba.notes: Brings personality and playfulness to contemporary pieces. Quality fun streetwear.

Guliang.description: Contemporary urban pieces with clean modern aesthetic. Understated approach to design focusing on wearability. Modern streetwear for everyday life.
Guliang.notes: Modern urban fashion with emphasis on wearability. Clean contemporary design.

Hell System.description: Dark, conceptual brand with system-inspired aesthetics. Heavy graphics exploring darker themes. For people interested in fashion with ideological edge.
Hell System.targetCustomer: Conceptual fashion enthusiasts aged 20-35 interested in ideologically-driven design
Hell System.notes: Explores darker, conceptual themes through streetwear. System-inspired design language.

Jarno.description: Contemporary pieces with Scandinavian minimalist influence. Clean lines, quality materials, timeless silhouettes. Built for understated sophistication.
Jarno.targetCustomer: Minimalist fashion enthusiasts aged 20-40 appreciating Nordic design
Jarno.notes: Scandinavian minimalist approach to contemporary fashion. Quality timeless pieces.

Jceaser.description: Confident contemporary brand with strong design identity. Balanced approach between bold and wearable. Modern pieces with personality and edge.
Jceaser.targetCustomer: Fashion-forward individuals aged 18-35 seeking confident pieces
Jceaser.notes: Strong design identity with confident approach. Bold modern fashion.

KUOYI.description: Contemporary Asian streetwear with refined aesthetics. Quality construction paired with thoughtful design. Modern pieces honoring craftsmanship.
KUOYI.notes: Emphasizes quality craftsmanship and refined design. Modern Asian streetwear.

Leviathan 1000.description: Massive, oversized-focused brand with emphasis on scale and presence. Theatrical silhouettes that command attention. For people who want to take up space.
Leviathan 1000.targetCustomer: Fashion lovers aged 18-35 interested in oversized and statement silhouettes
Leviathan 1000.notes: Specializes in oversized silhouettes and theatrical proportions. Bold presence-focused design.

lost Paradise.description: Nostalgic streetwear channeling memories of lost utopias. Vintage-inspired aesthetics with modern execution. Wistful, reflective design language.
lost Paradise.targetCustomer: Vintage fashion lovers aged 20-40 appreciating nostalgic aesthetics
lost Paradise.notes: Captures nostalgic and utopian themes through vintage-inspired design. Reflective approach.

Melanin.description: Celebrating melanin with bold, unapologetic design language. Culturally-rooted aesthetics paired with modern streetwear. Proud, identity-affirming pieces.
Melanin.notes: Celebrates cultural identity through bold, proud design. Culturally-rooted streetwear.

Mohair.description: Luxury-focused streetwear with emphasis on premium materials. Soft textures and high-quality fabrics paired with modern silhouettes. Comfort meets sophistication.
Mohair.notes: Focuses on premium materials like mohair and luxury construction. Sophisticated comfort.

Nomaniai.description: Experimental contemporary brand pushing design boundaries. Unconventional silhouettes and surprising material combinations. For fashion adventurers.
Nomaniai.targetCustomer: Fashion experimenters aged 18-35 seeking unconventional pieces
Nomaniai.notes: Pushes boundaries with experimental design. Unconventional approach to contemporary fashion.

NZPJ.description: Sharp, structured contemporary pieces with attention to tailoring. Modern silhouettes executed with precision. Clean design for people who value fit.
NZPJ.targetCustomer: Fashion enthusiasts aged 20-35 valuing precise fit and tailoring
NZPJ.notes: Emphasizes tailoring and structured silhouettes. Precision in modern design.

Original.description: Authentic contemporary brand focused on original design perspective. No trends, just sincere creative expression. For people who appreciate genuine design.
Original.notes: Commits to original creative vision. Sincere approach without trend-chasing.

Peoplesense.description: Community-focused brand celebrating human connection through fashion. Design for and with people in mind. Social-conscious contemporary pieces.
Peoplesense.notes: Emphasizes community and human connection. Social-conscious design approach.

PI0NEER.description: Pioneering brand charting new territory in contemporary streetwear. Experimental approach combined with wearability. For fashion frontierspeople.
PI0NEER.notes: Pioneers new approaches to streetwear design. Innovative and experimental.

Riot.description: Rebellious streetwear with chaotic energy and confrontational aesthetics. Loud graphics, bold statements, unapologetic attitude. For the uncompromising.
Riot.targetCustomer: Alternative fashion lovers aged 18-35 with rebellious aesthetic
Riot.notes: Brings rebellious energy to contemporary design. Uncompromising attitude.

Silver Bone.description: Skeletal and skeletal-inspired aesthetics in contemporary form. Bone-white color schemes, skeletal graphics, mystical edge. Gothic contemporary pieces.
Silver Bone.targetCustomer: Alternative fashion lovers aged 18-35 with gothic appreciation
Silver Bone.notes: Skeletal and bone-inspired aesthetics. Gothic contemporary design language.

Temporary.description: Impermanence-focused brand celebrating transient beauty. Pieces designed for the moment. Thoughtful approach to fashion as temporary expression.
Temporary.targetCustomer: Thoughtful fashion lovers aged 20-35 valuing experiential fashion
Temporary.notes: Explores themes of impermanence and transience. Conceptual contemporary pieces.

THEWET.description: Water-inspired aesthetic with fluid silhouettes and aquatic graphics. Wet, dripping motifs in streetwear form. For people fascinated by liquidity.
THEWET.notes: Water and aquatic themes influence design language. Fluid silhouettes and motifs.

ThinkDifferent.description: Concept-driven brand encouraging unconventional thinking. Thoughtful design language paired with intellectual approach. Fashion for the mind.
ThinkDifferent.notes: Emphasizes conceptual thinking in design. Thoughtful, idea-driven approach.

Vanguardia.description: Avant-garde contemporary brand pushing artistic boundaries. Spanish-influenced modernist approach to streetwear. Art-first fashion.
Vanguardia.notes: Brings Spanish avant-garde influence to contemporary streetwear. Artistic approach.

Whistlehunter.description: Playful brand with whistle-inspired aesthetics and hunting themes. Adventurous approach to contemporary design. Fun, energetic pieces.
Whistlehunter.notes: Playful hunting and adventure-inspired design. Energetic and fun approach.

White Iris.description: Ethereal floral-inspired streetwear with white iris motifs. Delicate aesthetic paired with modern silhouettes. Botanical contemporary fashion.
White Iris.targetCustomer: Fashion lovers aged 18-35 with botanical appreciation
White Iris.notes: Iris-inspired designs with delicate botanical aesthetics. Ethereal modern fashion.

XPXME.description: Experimental contemporary brand with emphasis on personal expression. Letter-play and typographic approach to design. Fashion as typography.
XPXME.targetCustomer: Creative individuals aged 18-35 seeking experimental pieces
XPXME.notes: Uses typography and letters as design language. Experimental expression through fashion.

ZDX.description: Minimalist contemporary pieces with Japanese design sensibility. Clean, precise execution on simple silhouettes. Modern essentials with Japanese attention to detail.
ZDX.targetCustomer: Minimalist fashion enthusiasts aged 20-40 appreciating Japanese design
ZDX.notes: Combines Japanese design philosophy with contemporary minimalism. Precise execution.

Zeppein.description: Bold, zeppelin-inspired aesthetic with airship motifs and vintage-futuristic vibes. Steampunk-leaning contemporary streetwear. For the inventive.
Zeppein.notes: Airship and zeppelin-inspired aesthetic. Vintage-futuristic contemporary pieces.
